description: You are the social media manager for an esports team. Using the raw tournament recording at /home/ga/Videos/esports_raw/tournament_finals.mp4 and the clipping notes in /home/ga/Videos/esports_raw/clipping_notes.txt, extract three highlight clips. Each clip must have the team logo (/home/ga/Videos/esports_raw/team_logo.png) burned into the top-right corner and normalized audio levels to balance the quiet game audio and loud commentators. Output the clips as 1920x1080 MP4 files using H.264 video and AAC audio. Save the files as highlight_1_ambush.mp4, highlight_2_defense.mp4, and highlight_3_victory.mp4 to /home/ga/Videos/social_highlights/. Create a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Videos/social_highlights/manifest.json containing a 'highlights' array with objects for each clip detailing 'filename', 'duration_seconds', 'title', and a 'watermarked' boolean set to true.
